title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Large banks are deploying Claude across their organizations. Anthropic hosted a virtual event called "The Briefing: Financial Services" where banking leaders discussed their implementations and use cases of Claude.
writeup: This video covers "The Briefing: Financial Services," a virtual event Anthropic hosted in which banking leaders discussed deploying Claude across their organizations. It documents how large banks are adopting the model and walks through their specific implementations and use cases. The takeaway is a view into enterprise AI adoption within financial services, presented through firsthand accounts from the institutions putting Claude into production.
